name: Pretzel Super Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the crushed pretzels and 3 tablespoons of sugar. Spread the mixture over the bottom of a 9 x 13 inch pan. Bake for a scant 10 minutes at 350°F. Cool completely.
2. In a separate bowl, cream together the softened cream cheese and 1/2 cup of sugar. Fold in the Cool Whip®. Spread this mixture evenly over the cooled, baked pretzel layer.
3. Dissolve the Jell-O gelatin in boiling water. Add the frozen strawberries immediately. Chill until the mixture starts to thicken. Spoon the chilled berry mixture over the cheese layer.
4. All components can be assembled and refrigerated up to one night before serving.
